title: Authentication, Authorization, Tenant Isolation, and Privacy · Runtime Contract: Feed Go Authentication Boundary
summary: User IDs arrive in headers, handlers authorize by route presence, shared source data leaks private follows, audit logs capture tokens and reading history, and deletion scope is unclear. Predict the reader decision, feed or API contract, Go and PostgreSQL ownership, bounded failure, and observable evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the feed go authentication boundary increment in tenant-safe identity and privacy boundary. Learners progress through pred…
objectives: Verify configured token issuer, audience, algorithm, time, key rotation, and transport before constructing a minimal principal.
Propagate the request context through application, database, and downstream work while preventing client disconnect from corrupting durable jobs.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
